calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Karen Farnsworth CSR #5162 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner's parents, Thom Tang Nguyen and Tam Luong, are present.
Peititioner, Vy Thuy Nguyen, is present.
Attorney, Clifford Y Wang, present representing the minor.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Minor's Name. Thom Tang Nguyen, Tam Luong, and Vy Thuy Nguyen are sworn and examined by the Court.

The matter having been submitted and no objections having been made to the proposed change of the minor's name made at the hearing, it appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Minor's Name to: ERICA VY THUY NGUYEN. Decree is submitted and signed in open court.
